snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Herai Basai | Extended Version | OFFICIAL VISUALIZER
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies, since so many of you said Herai Basai felt too short, we wanted to give it a little more life by making an extended version. We asked you all to send in videos with the people, places, pets, or anything you love, and we were truly overwhelmed by the incredible flood of love and support that came in. Watching all your beautiful videos made us smile so much, and it meant the world to see how deeply this song connected with you. WeвҖҷre so sorry we couldnвҖҷt fit every single submission, but please know weвҖҷre endlessly grateful to everyone who took the time to share something so special with us. We hope this video makes you smile and fills you with warmth, because I was smiling ear to ear when I watched it for the first time too ;)

Written, Composed, Performed by Yabesh Thapa
Produced by SNJV and Yabesh Thapa

Visuals by Noisy

Stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' 
https://open.spotify.com/album/5HG4L9mvKp4NTyIFDIxFir/
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VyOM8JRWBs0&list=OLAK5uy_np4irQUhmYgBbrQCMjvPbDpbxzdb3_DiM

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

snippet.title: GAREEB BETI KE AMEER SASURAL I аӨ—аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҖаӨ° аӨёаӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨІ I OFFICIAL TRAILER I RICHA DIXIT
snippet.description:
#richadixit #prashantsingh #rakeshbabu #ayazkhan #shaileshmishra #gareebbetikeameersasural #trailer #trending #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH RAMA PRASAD PRODUCTION

аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҖаӨ° аӨёаӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨІ (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“ аӨӢаӨҡаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҖаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ¬аҘӮ , аӨ…аӨҜаӨҫаҘӣ  аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨ°аӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫ   аӨёаӨҫаӨ№аӨЁаҘҖ  , аӨ®аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө  , аӨІаӨІаӨҝаӨӨ  аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ  , аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаҘӢаӨҰ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶  аӨңаҘҲаӨё ,аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ,  аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨң 
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨҜаӨ¶аӨёаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ 
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ…аӨңаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ• - аӨёаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ 
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°- аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө , аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨң  аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаҘҒаӨ• 
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨ—аҘҒаӨ°аӨңаӨӮаӨҹ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - 3 аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ- аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ°аӨІаӨҫ
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аҘӢ аӨҸаӨЎаӨҝаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаҘҖаӨө аӨёаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ 
 аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° - аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨң аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ ( аӨңаҘүаӨҜ )
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ…аӨөаӨ§аҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ
B.G.M - аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө  
 D.I  - аӨөаӨҝаӨңаӨҜ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ (аӨ®аҘҒаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаӨҫ )
аӨёаӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨЎ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ—  вҖ“ аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ  аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨҸаӨёаҘӢаӨёаӨҝаӨҸаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ®аҘҮаӨңаӨ° аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ 
аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨңаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҖ  аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ 

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ°аӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаӨҫаӨҰ

 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“  IVY Music 
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ

B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 
аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө


B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ
аӨ‘аӨ«аӨҝаӨё аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ - аӨ•аӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҲаӨҜаӨҫ аӨқаӨҫ

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ


B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё

аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨөаҘҮаӨҰаҘҖ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ«аҘҒаӨІаҘҚаӨІ

аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨҜаӨ¶аӨёаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№

аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°- аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө , аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨң  аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаҘҒаӨ•

snippet.title: Himali Bhegma (аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҮаӨ—аӨ®аӨҫ) -Trishna Gurung || Official Video
snippet.description:
Trishna Gurung on Spotify: https://spoti.fi/3fx2Tqc

вҖңаӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҮаӨ—аӨ®аӨҫвҖқ вҖ“ A Romantic Journey in the Himalayas вқ„пёҸ
Set against the majestic beauty of NepalвҖҷs Himalayan region, this song tells the story of love, distance, and deep emotional connection between two souls.
Cold winds, snowy landscapes, and warm hearts вҖ” all woven into one musical journey.
Dedicated to everyone who believes in true love вқӨпёҸ


Singer/ Lyrics: TRISHNA GURUNG 
Compose: TRISHNA GURUNG / SUNNY SUNAM
Music Producer / Mix Master: BIZU KARMACHARYAM
Director: PAVEL UDAS
Asistant Director: ANDEJ ADHIKARI
Cinematographer / Dop: MANISH ADHIKARI
Editor: BIZU KARMACHARYA
Colorist: Bikash khadgi

Actors: KRISHALA TAMANG / SANJEEV MAHARJAN
Cast: SANU GURUNG / PHUNTSOK GURUNG / YANGJENG GURUNG / AAEITEE GURUNG
ARJUN GHOTAME / RINJIN TSOMO SHERPA

Production Manager: AAROHAN THAPA
Wardrobe: DARJEELING STORE, BOUDHA (SHANKER BASNET)

Special Thanks: MOM & DAD, SONAMLA LAMA, KUMAR GURUNG, HOTEL THORANGLA, MANANG, PRATIBHA CHETTRI, MANDHAVI CHETTRI, ANWIT SHRESTHA, LUMAN STHAPIT & THE COLLAB.

snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Trailer): Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
15th May se Prajapati Pandey macha rahe hain bawaalвҖҰ Kaun Patni, Kaun Woh? Hal karenge saare sawaalвҖҰ Parivaar sahit dekhein! 

Presenting the Official Trailer of "Pati Patni Aur Woh Do" starring Ayushmann Khurrana, Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rakul Preet Singh, Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

Gulshan Kumar, B.R. Chopra & T-Series Present

вҖӢA T-Series Films & B.R. Studios Production

"Pati Patni Aur Woh Do"

snippet.title: Tera Chehra 8K/4K Music Video | Arijit Singh | Harshvardhan | Himesh Reshammiya | Sanam Teri Kasam
snippet.description:
Experience the timeless romance of Tera Chehra from the film Sanam Teri Kasam in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane this soulful track is sung by Arijit Singh with composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#terachehra #8k #arijitsingh #8kvideo  #sanamterikasam #harshvardhanrane #himeshreshammiya

Credits:
Song - Tera Chehra
Singer - Arijit Singh
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Shabbir Ahmedd

Lyrics:
Meri bechainiyon ko chain mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Mere deewanepan ko sabr mil jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na aankhon se
bheega bheega pyaar beh jaata hai

Meri tanhaiyon ko noor mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Main raat-din ye duaa karun
Tere liye main jiyun marun
Chaaron pehar tujhe dekha karun
Mera jahan ye tujhpe fanaa karun

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na honthon pe tera ehsaas
Reh jaata hai

Mere har raaste ko manzil mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Berang hawayein mujhe naa jaane
De gayi sadaa kyun abhi abhi
Hai sarfaroshi ye aashiqui bhi
Jaayegi jaan meri isme kabhi

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na har lamha teri daastaan
keh jaata hai

Meri har ik tadap ko sukoon mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

en.description:
Experience the timeless romance of Tera Chehra from the film Sanam Teri Kasam in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane this soulful track is sung by Arijit Singh with composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#terachehra #8k #arijitsingh #8kvideo  #sanamterikasam #harshvardhanrane #himeshreshammiya

bheega bheega pyaar beh jaata hai

Dekho na honthon pe tera ehsaas
Reh jaata hai

Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Hai sarfaroshi ye aashiqui bhi
Jaayegi jaan meri isme kabhi

Dekho na har lamha teri daastaan
keh jaata hai

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher NolanвҖҷs next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAXВ® film technology. The film brings HomerвҖҷs foundational saga to IMAXВ® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita NyongвҖҷo, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

Credits:

Lyrics: Jasmine Sandlas, Shashwat Sachdev

Tune parda uthaaya, haaye kya baat ho gayi 
Haaye 
Ye mulakaat, vaardaat ho gayi 
Nain milaaye humne ik dooje se yoon 
Raat hui 
Phir din 
Phir se raat ho gayi 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Ik afeemi main chaskha chakhaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Aye Haye Tum bhi ho tanha 
Aur hum akele Jo saath huye laajawab ho gaye 
Tum bhi haseen aur hum aashqeen 
Jo raat huyi benaqaab ho gaye 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Gulabi ye sharbat pilaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik rangeela samandar

Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan

Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan

snippet.title: King Trailer Leaked Shahrukh Khan vs Salman Khan Superhero | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
King Trailer Leaked + Salman Khan Superhero Movie Reaction by Deeksha Sharma. Shahrukh Khan with Deepika Padukone in Sidharth Anand King Movie leaked Pictures will challenge Jawan & Pathaan for Box Office Records while Salman Khan with Director Raj & Dk is ready for Shocking Announcement where as Raja Shivaji Riteish Deshmukh Movie created History in Marathi Cinema with Day 1 Collection Numbers but Real Question lies with Maddock who after Cocktail 2 will be back with Shakti Shalini Aneet Padda Horror Film after Saiyaara to Clash with both Avengers Doomsday & King Srk in December. What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#KingTrailer #ShahrukhKhan #SalmanKhanSuperhero

snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng рҹ’–вңЁ

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. рҹ’«

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, donвҖҷt miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. рҹҺ¶

'аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ аӨҮаӨңаӨј аӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨ—' аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ® аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ 'аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ“аӨ°' аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҰаҘӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨ№аӨёаҘӮаӨё аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ рҹ’–вңЁ

аӨ…аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜ аӨ¬аҘүаӨІаҘҖаӨөаҘҒаӨЎ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ…аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҜ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аҘҲаӨҹаӨ°аҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҲаӨ« аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҮаӨё аӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨ• аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨ®аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮаӨ®аӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨ–аҘӮаӨ¬аӨёаҘӮаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҜаӨҫаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аӨӨ аӨ«аӨӨаҘҮаӨ№ аӨ…аӨІаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҳаҘӢаӨ·аӨҫаӨІ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ® аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ¬аӨҰаҘҚаӨ§ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ 'аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ“аӨ°' аӨҶаӨң аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ¬аҘүаӨІаҘҖаӨөаҘҒаӨЎ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ® аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаӨҰаӨҫаӨ¬аӨ№аӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨ• аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҒаӨ° аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ, аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӣаҘӮ аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘӢаӨІ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨөаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨ®аӨ°аӨЈаҘҖаӨҜ аӨҰаҘғаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аҘҮ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ« аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨёаӨҝаӨ•аӨІ аӨ¬аҘүаӨІаҘҖаӨөаҘҒаӨЎ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¶аҘҢаӨ•аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ, 'аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ“аӨ°' аӨҸаӨ• аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫ аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаӨҫаӨө аӨӘаҘҲаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ°аӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ рҹ’«

аӨ…аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҜ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аҘҲаӨҹаӨ°аҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҲаӨ« аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨ аӨҝаӨӨ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҡаӨ®аӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҖ аӨңаӨҫаӨҰаҘҒаӨҲ аӨ•аҘҮаӨ®аӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨЁаӨӮаӨҰ аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ, 'аӨөаҘҮаӨІаӨ•аӨ®' аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ-аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ 'аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ аӨҮаӨңаӨј аӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨ—' аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ№аӨҝаӨҹ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ 'аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҰаӨҫ', 'аӨӨаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ' аӨ”аӨ° 'аӨӯаҘӮаӨӨаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ' аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁ аӨӯаҘӮаӨІаҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ рҹҺ¶

рҹ’¬ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨё аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ вҖ” аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨ• аӨ¬аҘүаӨІаҘҖаӨөаҘҒаӨЎ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ?

id.title: Teri Ore (Video Lirik) | Singh Adalah Raja | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Lagu Cinta
id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng рҹ’–вңЁ

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. рҹ’«

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. рҹҺ¶

рҹ’¬ Beri tahu kami di kolom komentar вҖ” apakah ini lagu Bollywood romantis favoritmu?

snippet.title: Bangles (OfficialВ #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аӨЎаҘҖ
snippet.description:
|| рҹ•ү ||
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod
Music Produced By - G-Spark

snippet.description:
рҹ’– Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 рҹ’–

Is khoobsurat gaane вҖңTujh Sang Preet Lagai SajnaвҖқ mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai вқӨпёҸ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua hoвҖҰ chahe wo milan ho ya judai рҹ’”

рҹҺ¶ Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.
Tujh sang preet lagai sajana рҹҺ¶рҹ’– аӨӨаҘҒаӨқ аӨёаӨӮаӨ— аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨ аӨІаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІаӨ®аӨҫ Hindi new song #daradвҖӢ bhara geet wed #songвҖӢ

snippet.title: O Meri Laila | Laila Majnu | Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein | Tu Meri Laila
snippet.description:
Movie - Laila Majnu
Cast - Avinash Tiwary & Tripti Dimri

Song -  O Meri Laila
Singers - Jyotica Tangri
Music - Joi Barua
Lyrics - Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:

Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein
Aise Bhatakta Hoon Din Raat Dikhta Hoon Main Teri Raahon Mein
Mere Gunaho Mein Mere Sawabo Mein Shamil Tu
Bhooli Atthanni Si Bachpan Ke Kurte Mein Se Mil Tu

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Laila
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Maangi Thi Duwaen Jo Unka Hi Asar Hai Hum Sath Hain
Na Yahan Dikhawa Hai Na Yahan Dunyavi Jazbaat Hain

Yahan Pe Bhi Tu Hooron Se Zyada Haseen 
Yaani Dono Jahanon Mein Tumsa Nahi
Jeet Li Hain Aakhir Mein Hum Dono Ne Yeh Baaziyan 

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Lailan
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Zaiqa Jawani Mein, Khwaabon Mein Yaar Ki Mehmaani Mein
Marziyaan Tumhari Hon, Khush Rahoon Main Teri Manmaani Mein

Band Aakhein Karoon Din Ko Raatein Karoon
Teri Zulfon Ko Sehla Ke Baatein Karoon
Ishq Mein Un Baaton Se Hon Meethi Si Naraaziyan

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Lailan
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

snippet.title: Tujh sang preet lagai sajanaрҹ’– аӨӨаҘҒаӨқ аӨёаӨӮаӨ— аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨ аӨІаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨёаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ Hindi new song #daradвҖӢ bhara geet wed #songвҖӢ
snippet.description:
рҹ’– Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 рҹ’–

Is khoobsurat gaane вҖңTujh Sang Preet Lagai SajnaвҖқ mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai вқӨпёҸ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua hoвҖҰ chahe wo milan ho ya judai рҹ’”

рҹҺ¶ Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.
Tujh sang preet lagai sajana рҹҺ¶рҹ’– аӨӨаҘҒаӨқ аӨёаӨӮаӨ— аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨ аӨІаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІаӨ®аӨҫ Hindi new song #daradвҖӢ bhara geet wed #songвҖӢ

snippet.title: Oshin Karki - Ghar feat. SAGEnomore (Prod. by pozod)
snippet.description:
вҖңGharвҖқ is a song about missing someone so deeply that even distance, time and change cannot take them away from you. Some people may leave, but they still feel like home. It captures the quiet ache of two souls who found each other in a time that couldnвҖҷt hold them, yet left an imprint too deep to fade. вҖңGharвҖқ is a promise that even in distance, in silence, in separate lives, a part of us continues to belong to the one who once felt like home. ItвҖҷs about carrying someone within you not as a wound but as a warmth. A memory. A home you can never return to, yet never truly leave.

Written composed and performed by Oshin Karki and SAGEnomore
Prod. by pozod
Cameo: Aash and Celine Prajapati
Shot by Sayun Shakya and storenutter
Production Manager: Celine Prajapati
Directed by storenutter

В© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ - аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаҘҖ - аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨЁаӨ®аҘӢаӨІ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ || аӨңаӨҜ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨҫ | аҘҗ аӨңаӨҜ аӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶ аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ

аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ - аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаҘҖ - аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨЁаӨ®аҘӢаӨІ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ || аӨңаӨҜ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨҫ | аҘҗ аӨңаӨҜ аӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶ аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ

#аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӘаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ®аӨ№аҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨӘаҘӮаӨ° #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨІаӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨё #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨ®аҘӢаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨ® #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖomjaijagdishhareaartisheebaashishchandranewaarti2022vishnuji #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨ¬аӨ”аӨ°аӨӘаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҡаӨҝаӨ® #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨё #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨӮаӨ—аӨҹаҘӢаӨЁ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҮаӨҹаӨё #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮlyrics #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮаӨӘаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮand #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮhandedv

snippet.title: Dil Mere Naa | Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik | Fida | Shahid Kapoor, Kareena Kapoor | 90's Love Song
snippet.description:
Dil Mere Naa | Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik | Fida | Shahid Kapoor, Kareena Kapoor | 90's Love Song

#uditnarayan #alkayagnik #romanticsongs #shahidkapoor #kareenakapoorkhan #90sromanticsongs #90severgreen 

Song Credits:
Singer(s): Udit Narayan & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films
Director: Ken Ghosh
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Fardeen Khan & Kareena Kapoor



Song Lyrics:
Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Dil Mere Na, Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Dil Mere Na, Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

I Love You Love You Like Crazy
I Want You Want You Like Crazy
Kisi Aur Ki Na Hone Doon Main
Meri Zindagaani Hai Tu
Jise Raat Din Main Padhta Raha
Meri Voh Kahaani Hai Tu

Maine Teri Baaton Pe Yakeen Kar Liya
Baahon Ki Panaahon Mein Tujhe Bhar Liya, Aa Jaa
Jaan Kehti Hai, Jaan Kehti Hai Mujhpe Jaan Nisaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

I Love You Love You Like Crazy
I Want You Want You Like Crazy

Deewaanon Se Bhi Deewaana Hai Tu
Teri Zid Se Haari Hoon Main
Mere Saathiya Mujhe Hai Pata
Teri Beqaraari Hoon Main

Khwaabon Mein Khayaalon Mein Basaake Rakhoon
Main To Tujhe Palkon Mein Chhupaake Rakhoon, Aa Jaa
Mehbooba Tu, Mehbooba Tu Mera Aitbaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

I Love You Love You Like Crazy`

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Just one more tear to cry, one teardrop from my eye
You better save it for
The middle of the night when things aren't black and white
Enter, Troubadour
"Remember twenty-four?"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning

[Verse 2]
This song has started now, and you're just finding out
Now isn't that a laugh?
A major sacrifice, but clueless at the time
Enter, Caroline
"Just trust me, you'll be fine"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye, goodbye, goodbye)

[Bridge]
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
Oh, I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye)

snippet.description:
Presenting the lyrical video of Thodi Der sung by Farhan Saeed & Shreya Ghoshal.

Song - Thodi Der
Singers - Farhan Saeed & Shreya Ghoshal
Music - Farhan Saeed
Lyricist - Kumaar

Music Arranged And Programmed By Dj Phukan
Asst. Madhab Deka  
Co-Arranged & Keyboards By Ali Mustafa 
Acoustic And Electric Guitar By Ankur Mukherjee
Harmonium By Aditya Oke 
Sarangi By Murad Ali Khan

Vocals Recorded At Phatbox, (Mumbai) 
Recording Engineer's - Pankaj Borah & Bhaskar Sarma

SXYBIT вҖ“ One For The Night (Official Music Video)
One For The Night is a soft and emotional music video that captures a special late-night moment, a quiet connection, and the feeling of being close to someone, even if just for a night.
This visual story is crafted with clean cinematic shots, soft lighting, and smooth transitions, creating a calm and immersive atmosphere that beautifully blends with the night-time mood of the music.

The video focuses on gentle emotions, meaningful moments, and subtle storytelling, making it suitable for all audiences and fully compliant with YouTubeвҖҷs Community Guidelines and monetization policies.

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man - Salman Khan, Rani, Preity | Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Credits:

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer
Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta
Director: Abbas-Mustan

Lyrics:

аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аӨЁ
аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ—аӨІ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ§аӨЎаӨјаӨ•аӨЁ
аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаӨӘаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҢаӨёаӨ® аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨёаӨңаҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҜаӨІ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨ¬аӨңаҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨ–аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨӣаҘҚаӨҡаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҸ аӨЁаӨҫ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ
аӨҮаӨё аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨ“аӨ№
аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ
аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ
аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ§аӨЎаӨјаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҮ аӨёаӨЁаӨ®
аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨөаӨ«аӨјаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨІаӨҝаӨ–аҘҖ
аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨңаӨҝаӨ—аӨ°
аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ№аӨёаҘҖаӨЁ аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨІаӨҝаӨ–аҘҖ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ•аӨҫаӨңаӨІ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨ№аӨҫаӨёаҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨЁаҘҲаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨқаҘҒаӨ•аҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаӨӘаҘҮ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҸ аӨЁаӨҫ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ
аӨҮаӨё аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ, аӨ№аҘӢ
аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ
аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ
аӨ“ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ°аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨҫ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ
аӨңаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҒаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ…аӨёаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаҘҖ
аӨ–аҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҮаӨ•аӨҫ аӨҡаӨ®аӨЁ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ¬аӨӮаӨ§аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨ¬аӨҒаӨ§аҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҢаӨёаӨ® аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮаӨёаӨҫ аӨІаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҸ аӨЁаӨҫ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӨаҘӮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ
аӨҮаӨё аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ
аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аӨЁ
аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ—аӨІ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ§аӨЎаӨјаӨ•аӨЁ
аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаӨӘаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҢаӨёаӨ® аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨёаӨңаҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҜаӨІ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҒ аӨ¬аӨңаҘҮ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨ–аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨӣаҘҚаӨҡаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҸ аӨЁаӨҫ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ, аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨқаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮ

hi.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man - Salman Khan, Rani, Preity | Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
hi.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik

Lyricist: Sameer

Director: Abbas-Mustan

Welcome back to the channel! In this 20-minute special episode, we dive deep into the world of GTA 5 featuring our favorite characters Franklin and Shinchan. snippet.title: I Created the World's Largest Minecraft Army
snippet.description:
In 5 days, the army of Cindercrest is coming to invade my kingdom. As the king of this server, I'm going to do whatever it takes to stop them... creating an army of 10's of thousands of players. This is How I Created the World's Largest Minecraft Army.

Unstable SMP:
вһң вҖӘ  вҖӘ  вҖӘ@FlameFragsMC 
вһң     вҖӘ@wemmbumc 
вһң     вҖӘ@Spokeishere 
вһң     вҖӘ@ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird@FlameFragsMC @ClownPierce 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: Free Skin. Free Scenery. Free Chests. рҹ‘Җ Yes, You Read That Right!
snippet.description:
Free skin. Free scenery. Free chests. рҹ‘Җ Yes, you read that right!

The Clash vs. Skeletons event is live, so itвҖҷs time to pick a team and push back against the Skeletons! 

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–ә https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–ә https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok в–ә https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.

аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаҘҲаӨ¶ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨІаҘҮаӨҹаӨЁаҘҚаӨё аӨҮаӨөаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ°аҘӮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҡаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨёаӨ®аӨҜ аӨҶ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® аӨҡаҘҒаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨІаҘҮаӨҹаӨЁаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨ«аӨј аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ!

аӨ№аӨ®аӨІаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ¬аӨҡаӨҫаӨө аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ°аӨЈаӨЁаҘҖаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒаҘӨ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ¬аӨҫаӨҮаӨІ аӨЎаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨҮаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ«аӨјаҘҚаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЎаӨҫаӨүаӨЁаӨІаҘӢаӨЎ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

аӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁаӨҰаӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘӮаӨӮаӨӣаҘӢаӨӮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨёаҘҲаӨІ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨ¬аӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨҶаӨ— аӨІаӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҰаҘӮаӨ—аӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨӨаӨ•, аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ–аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ¬аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаҘҖаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ“аӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ! аӨ№аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨөаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҡаӨҫаӨө аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҒаӨө аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ, аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӯаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨ–аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨ¬аӨІаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аӨ¬аҘҖаӨІаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨЁаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨ•аӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аӨ¬аҘҖаӨІаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒаҘӨ
аӨ•аҘғаӨӘаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ! аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаҘҲаӨ¶ аӨ‘аӨ«аӨј аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаҘҲаӨЁаҘҚаӨё аӨЎаӨҫаӨүаӨЁаӨІаҘӢаӨЎ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ–аҘҮаӨІаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ«аӨјаҘҚаӨӨ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ№аӨҫаӨІаӨҫаӨҒаӨ•аӨҝ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨ—аҘҮаӨ® аӨҶаӨҮаӨҹаӨ® аӨ…аӨёаӨІаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҲаӨёаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ№аҘҖ, аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮаӨөаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ—аҘӢаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖаӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨЁаҘҖаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаҘҲаӨ¶ аӨ‘аӨ«аӨј аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаҘҲаӨЁаҘҚаӨё аӨ–аҘҮаӨІаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨЎаӨҫаӨүаӨЁаӨІаҘӢаӨЎ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨҜаҘҒ аӨ•аӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ® 13 аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨ№аҘӢаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸаҘӨ
аӨЁаҘҮаӨҹаӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ• аӨ•аӨЁаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜаӨ• аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ·аӨӨаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ
- аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨӮаӨө аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨңаҘҮаӨҜ аӨ•аӨҝаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ
- аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨ¬аӨ° аӨҜаҘӢаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ, аӨӨаҘҖаӨ°аӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨңаҘӢаӨӮ, аӨ№аҘүаӨ— аӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨЎаӨ°аҘҚаӨё, аӨңаӨҫаӨҰаҘӮаӨ—аӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ, аӨЎаҘҚаӨ°аҘҲаӨ—аӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨҜаҘӢаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ
- аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӯаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨ¬аӨІаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҖ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘүаӨ«аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮ аӨңаҘҖаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ
- аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ°аҘҚаӨөаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ·аҘҚаӨ  аӨ•аӨ¬аҘҖаӨІаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ
- аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨөаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аӨ¬аҘҖаӨІаҘҮ аӨҜаҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ аӨ•аӨ¬аҘҖаӨІаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨ« аӨІаӨЎаӨјаҘҮаӨӮ
- аӨ•аӨҲ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЎ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ 18 аӨ…аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҝаӨӨаҘҖаӨҜ аӨҮаӨ•аӨҫаӨҮаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ

- аӨӨаҘӢаӨӘаҘӢаӨӮ, аӨҹаӨҫаӨөаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ, аӨ¬аӨ®аҘӢаӨӮ, аӨңаӨҫаӨІаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨҰаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨӮаӨө аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX вҖ” berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun вҖ” baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

ЧЁЧ•Ч‘ЧңЧ•Ч§ЧЎ Ч”Ч•Чҗ ЧһЧ’ЧЁЧ© ЧһЧ©Ч—Ч§ЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧҷЧЁЧҳЧ•ЧҗЧңЧҷ ЧһЧ§Ч•Ч•Чҹ Ч•ЧЎЧ“Ч Ч”, Ч©Ч‘Ч• ЧҷЧңЧ“ЧҷЧқ Ч‘ЧӣЧң Ч”Ч’ЧҷЧңЧҗЧҷЧқ ЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧңЧҷЧқ ЧңЧӘЧ§Ч©ЧЁ, ЧңЧҷЧҰЧ•ЧЁ, ЧңЧҷЧ”Ч Ч•ЧӘ Ч•ЧңЧңЧһЧ•Ч“ Ч‘Ч‘ЧҳЧ—Ч”. Ч–Ч” ЧҷЧҷЧ—Ч•Ч“Чҷ Ч‘ЧӣЧҡ Ч©ЧӣЧһЧўЧҳ ЧӣЧң Ч“Ч‘ЧЁ Ч‘-ROBLOX ЧһЧӘЧ•ЧӣЧ Чҹ Ч•Ч Ч‘Ч Ч” ЧўЧң ЧҷЧ“Чҷ Ч—Ч‘ЧЁЧҷ Ч”Ч§Ч”ЧҷЧңЧ”. ROBLOX ЧһЧҷЧ•ЧўЧ“ ЧңЧ’ЧҷЧңЧҗЧҷ 13 ЧўЧ“ 18, ЧҗЧҡ ЧӨЧӘЧ•Ч— ЧңЧҗЧ Ч©ЧҷЧқ Ч‘ЧӣЧң Ч”Ч’ЧҷЧңЧҗЧҷЧқ. ЧӣЧң Ч©Ч—Ч§Чҹ ЧһЧӘЧ—ЧҷЧң Ч‘Ч‘Ч—ЧҷЧЁЧӘ ЧҗЧ•Ч•ЧҳЧҗЧЁ Ч•ЧһЧӘЧҹ Ч–Ч”Ч•ЧӘ ЧңЧ•. ЧңЧҗЧ—ЧЁ ЧһЧӣЧҹ Ч”Чқ ЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧңЧҷЧқ ЧңЧ—Ч§Ч•ЧЁ ЧҗЧӘ ROBLOX - ЧңЧӘЧ§Ч©ЧЁ ЧўЧқ ЧҗЧ—ЧЁЧҷЧқ ЧўЧң ЧҷЧ“Чҷ ЧҰ'ЧҗЧҳ, ЧһЧ©Ч—Ч§Чҷ ЧһЧ©Ч—Ч§ЧҷЧқ ЧҗЧ• Ч©ЧҷЧӘЧ•ЧЈ ЧӨЧўЧ•ЧңЧ” Ч‘ЧӨЧЁЧ•ЧҷЧ§ЧҳЧҷЧқ ЧҷЧҰЧҷЧЁЧӘЧҷЧҷЧқ. ЧӣЧң Ч©Ч—Ч§Чҹ ЧһЧ§Ч‘Чң Ч’Чқ ЧӨЧҷЧЎЧӘ Ч§ЧЁЧ§Чў ЧңЧҗ ЧһЧӨЧ•ЧӘЧ—ЧӘ ЧһЧ©ЧңЧ• ЧҷЧ—Ч“ ЧўЧқ ЧҗЧЁЧ’Ч– ЧӣЧңЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧҷЧЁЧҳЧ•ЧҗЧңЧҷ Ч©Ч‘ЧўЧ–ЧЁЧӘЧ• Ч ЧҷЧӘЧҹ ЧңЧўЧҰЧ‘ Ч•ЧңЧ‘Ч Ч•ЧӘ ЧӣЧң Ч“Ч‘ЧЁ - Ч‘ЧҷЧҹ ЧҗЧқ Ч–Ч” Ч’Ч•ЧЁЧ“ Ч©Ч—Ч§ЧҷЧқ Ч ЧҷЧ•Ч•Чҳ, ЧһЧЎЧ•Ч§ ЧӨЧўЧҷЧң, ЧһЧӣЧ•Ч ЧӘ ЧӨЧҷЧ Ч‘Ч•Чң ЧўЧ Ч§ЧҷЧӘ, ЧһЧ©Ч—Ч§ ЧһЧЁЧ•Ч‘Ч” ЧһЧ©ЧӘЧӘЧӨЧҷЧқ "ЧңЧӣЧҷЧ“ЧӘ Ч”Ч“Ч’Чң" ЧҗЧ• ЧҷЧҰЧҷЧЁЧ” ЧҗЧ—ЧЁЧӘ Ч©ЧҳЧЁЧқ Ч”Ч•ЧһЧҰЧҗЧ”. ЧҗЧҷЧҹ ЧўЧңЧ•ЧӘ ЧўЧ‘Ч•ЧЁ Ч—ЧңЧ§ЧӘ ЧҗЧ“ЧһЧ” Ч•ЧҷЧЁЧҳЧ•ЧҗЧңЧҷЧӘ ЧЁЧҗЧ©Ч•Ч Ч” Ч–Ч•. ЧўЧң ЧҷЧ“Чҷ Ч”Ч©ЧӘЧӘЧӨЧ•ЧӘ Ч•Ч‘Ч ЧҷЧҷЧӘ Ч“Ч‘ЧЁЧҷЧқ ЧһЧ’Ч ЧҷЧ‘ЧҷЧқ, Ч—Ч‘ЧЁЧҷ ROBLOX ЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧңЧҷЧқ ЧңЧ”ЧЁЧ•Ч•ЧҷЧ— ЧӘЧ’ЧҷЧқ ЧһЧҷЧ•Ч—Ч“ЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧӣЧҹ Ч“Ч•ЧңЧЁЧҷЧқ Ч©Чң ROBLOX ("Robux"). Ч‘ЧӘЧ•ЧЁЧқ, Ч”Чқ ЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧңЧҷЧқ ЧңЧ§Ч Ч•ЧӘ Ч‘Ч§ЧҳЧңЧ•Ч’ Ч”ЧһЧ§Ч•Ч•Чҹ Ч‘Ч’Ч“ЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧҗЧ‘ЧҷЧ–ЧЁЧҷЧқ ЧңЧҗЧ•Ч•ЧҳЧҗЧЁЧҷЧқ, ЧӣЧһЧ• Ч’Чқ Ч—Ч•ЧһЧЁЧҷ Ч‘Ч ЧҷЧҷЧ” ЧҗЧҷЧӣЧ•ЧӘЧҷЧҷЧқ, ЧЁЧӣЧҷЧ‘ЧҷЧқ ЧҗЧҷЧ ЧҳЧЁЧҗЧ§ЧҳЧҷЧ‘ЧҷЧҷЧқ Ч•ЧһЧ Ч’Ч Ч•Ч ЧҷЧқ ЧӨЧ•ЧўЧңЧҷЧқ.

La sua particolaritГ  ГЁ che praticamente tutto su ROBLOX ГЁ progettato e costruito dai membri della community. ROBLOX ГЁ pensato per ragazzi dai 13 ai 18 anni, ma ГЁ aperto a persone di tutte le etГ . Ogni giocatore inizia scegliendo un avatar e dandogli un'identitГ . PuГІ quindi esplorare ROBLOX, interagendo con gli altri tramite chat, giocando o collaborando a progetti creativi. Ogni giocatore riceve anche un proprio appezzamento di terreno virtuale non edificato, insieme a una cassetta degli attrezzi virtuale con cui progettare e costruire qualsiasi cosa: un grattacielo navigabile, un elicottero funzionante, un flipper gigante, un gioco multiplayer "Cattura la bandiera" o qualsiasi altra creazione ancora da immaginare. A loro volta, possono utilizzare questi Robux per acquistare abbigliamento e accessori per il proprio avatar, nonchГ© materiali da costruzione di alta qualitГ , componenti interattivi e meccanismi funzionanti dal catalogo online.

ВҝQuГ© es Roblox? Roblox es un mundo virtual y plataforma de creaciГіn en lГӯnea donde niГұos y niГұas de todas las edades pueden interactuar, crear, divertirse y aprender de forma segura. Es Гәnico porque prГЎcticamente todo en ROBLOX estГЎ diseГұado y construido por los miembros de la comunidad. ROBLOX estГЎ diseГұado para jГіvenes de 13 a 18 aГұos, pero estГЎ abierto a personas de todas las edades. Cada jugador comienza eligiendo un avatar y dГЎndole una identidad. Luego, puede explorar ROBLOX, interactuando con otros mediante el chat, jugando o colaborando en proyectos creativos. Cada jugador tambiГ©n recibe su propio terreno virtual sin desarrollar, junto con un conjunto de herramientas virtuales para diseГұar y construir cualquier cosa: desde un rascacielos navegable o un helicГіptero funcional, hasta una mГЎquina de pinball gigante, un juego multijugador de "Captura la Bandera" o cualquier otra creaciГіn imaginable. Este primer terreno virtual es gratuito. Al participar y construir cosas increГӯbles, los miembros de ROBLOX pueden ganar insignias especiales y dГіlares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Con estos, pueden comprar ropa y accesorios para sus avatares en el catГЎlogo en lГӯnea, asГӯ como materiales de construcciГіn premium, componentes interactivos y mecanismos funcionales.

РҡРҫР¶РҪРҫРјСғ РіСҖР°РІСҶРөРІС– СӮР°РәРҫР¶ РҪР°РҙР°С”СӮСҢСҒСҸ РІР»Р°СҒРҪРёР№ СҲРјР°СӮРҫРә РҪРөР·Р°РұСғРҙРҫРІР°РҪРҫС— РҪРөСҖСғС…РҫРјРҫСҒСӮС– СҖР°Р·РҫРј С–Р· РІС–СҖСӮСғР°Р»СҢРҪРёРј РҪР°РұРҫСҖРҫРј С–РҪСҒСӮСҖСғРјРөРҪСӮС–РІ, Р·Р° РҙРҫРҝРҫРјРҫРіРҫСҺ СҸРәРҫРіРҫ РјРҫР¶РҪР° РҝСҖРҫРөРәСӮСғРІР°СӮРё СӮР° РұСғРҙСғРІР°СӮРё СүРҫ Р·Р°РІРіРҫРҙРҪРҫ вҖ” РұСғРҙСҢ СӮРҫ С…РјР°СҖРҫСҮРҫСҒ, СҸРәРёРј РјРҫР¶РҪР° РәРөСҖСғРІР°СӮРё, СҖРҫРұРҫСҮРёР№ РіРөР»С–РәРҫРҝСӮРөСҖ, РіС–РіР°РҪСӮСҒСҢРәРёР№ РҝС–РҪРұРҫР»СҢРҪРёР№ Р°РІСӮРҫРјР°СӮ, РұР°РіР°СӮРҫРәРҫСҖРёСҒСӮСғРІР°СҶСҢРәР° РіСҖР° В«Р—Р°С…РҫРҝР»РөРҪРҪСҸ РҝСҖР°РҝРҫСҖР°В» СҮРё СҸРәРөСҒСҢ С–РҪСҲРө, СүРө РҪРө РІРёРіР°РҙР°РҪРө СӮРІРҫСҖС–РҪРҪСҸ. РҰСҸ РҝРөСҖСҲР° РҙС–Р»СҸРҪРәР° РІС–СҖСӮСғР°Р»СҢРҪРҫС— Р·РөРјР»С– РұРөР·РәРҫСҲСӮРҫРІРҪР°. Р‘РөСҖСғСҮРё СғСҮР°СҒСӮСҢ СӮР° РұСғРҙСғСҺСҮРё РәСҖСғСӮС– СҖРөСҮС–, СғСҮР°СҒРҪРёРәРё ROBLOX РјРҫР¶СғСӮСҢ Р·Р°СҖРҫРұР»СҸСӮРё СҒРҝРөСҶС–Р°Р»СҢРҪС– Р·РҪР°СҮРәРё, Р° СӮР°РәРҫР¶ РҙРҫР»Р°СҖРё ROBLOX (В«RobuxВ»). РЈ СҒРІРҫСҺ СҮРөСҖРіСғ, РІРҫРҪРё РјРҫР¶СғСӮСҢ РәСғРҝСғРІР°СӮРё РҫРҙСҸРі СӮР° Р°РәСҒРөСҒСғР°СҖРё РҙР»СҸ Р°РІР°СӮР°СҖС–РІ РІ РҫРҪР»Р°Р№РҪ-РәР°СӮР°Р»РҫР·С–, Р° СӮР°РәРҫР¶ РҝСҖРөРјС–Р°Р»СҢРҪС– РұСғРҙС–РІРөР»СҢРҪС– РјР°СӮРөСҖС–Р°Р»Рё, С–РҪСӮРөСҖР°РәСӮРёРІРҪС– РәРҫРјРҝРҫРҪРөРҪСӮРё СӮР° СҖРҫРұРҫСҮС– РјРөС…Р°РҪС–Р·РјРё.

аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҮаӨё рҹ”ҙ LIVE аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ® Grand Theft Auto V аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨңаӨ¬аӨ°аӨҰаӨёаҘҚаӨӨ аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаӨӘаҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ!

рҹҡ—рҹ’Ҙ 100 аӨІаӨ—аҘҚаӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨөаҘҮ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҲаӨ• аӨӘаӨ° аӨ–аӨЎаӨјаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
рҹҡҶ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҶ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨІ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘҖаӨЎ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁ!

рҹҳұ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ®аӨ№аӨӮаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ• аӨӘаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖ?
аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаӨ¬ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨ—аӨҫ аӨҡаӨ•аӨЁаӨҫаӨҡаҘӮаӨ°?

рҹ‘ү LIVE аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаҘӢ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҢаӨЁ аӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ— аӨ№аҘҲ!

а®Үа®ЁаҜҚа®Ө а®өаҜҖа®ҹа®ҝа®ҜаҜӢа®өа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ, а®Һа®©а®ӨаҜҒ 6 а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ $10,000-а®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®…а®Өа®ҝа®•а®®а®ҫа®© а®Әа®°а®ҝа®ҡаҜҒа®ӨаҜҚ а®ӨаҜҠа®•аҜҲа®ҜаҜҲ а®өаҜҶа®ІаҜҚа®өа®Өа®ұаҜҚа®•а®ҫа®•а®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜӢа®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҝа®ҹаҜҒа®•а®ҝа®ұа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ! а®Ёа®ҫа®©аҜҚ а®’а®°аҜҒ Minecraft а®үа®Іа®•а®ҝа®©аҜҚ а®ӨаҜҠа®ҹа®•аҜҚа®•а®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҒа®іаҜҚа®іа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ (spawn) а®’а®°аҜҒ а®Өа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®•аҜҚ а®•аҜҒа®өа®ҝа®Ҝа®ІаҜҲ а®өаҜҲа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҮа®©аҜҚ; а®…а®Өа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®үа®іаҜҚа®і а®’а®өаҜҚа®өаҜҠа®°аҜҒ а®Өа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®•аҜҚ а®•а®ҹаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҒа®®аҜҚ $1 а®®а®Өа®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ а®үа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ. а®Һа®©а®ӨаҜҒ а®Ёа®ЈаҜҚа®Әа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®Үа®ӨаҜҲ а®Һа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҹа®ҝа®ҡаҜҚ а®ҡа®®а®ҫа®іа®ҝа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚа®Әа®ӨаҜҲ а®…а®ұа®ҝа®Ҝ а®Ёа®ҫа®©аҜҚ а®®а®ҝа®•а®өаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Ҷа®өа®Іа®ҫа®• а®Үа®°аҜҒа®ЁаҜҚа®ӨаҜҮа®©аҜҚвҖ”а®…а®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®’а®°аҜҒа®өа®°аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•аҜҠа®°аҜҒа®өа®°аҜҚ а®ӨаҜҒа®°аҜӢа®•а®®аҜҚ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®өа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•а®іа®ҫ а®…а®ІаҜҚа®Іа®ӨаҜҒ а®Үа®ЈаҜҲа®ЁаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®ҡаҜҶа®Ҝа®ІаҜҚа®Әа®ҹаҜҒа®өа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•а®іа®ҫ? а®Һа®Өа®ұаҜҚа®•аҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®…а®©аҜҒа®®а®Өа®ҝ а®үа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ. а®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®ҹаҜҒа®Өа®ІаҜҚ, а®’а®іа®ҝа®ЁаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®•аҜҠа®іаҜҚа®іаҜҒа®Өа®ІаҜҚ, а®“а®°а®ҝа®ҹа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®ІаҜҮа®ҜаҜҮ а®Әа®ӨаҜҒа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®ҝа®Ҝа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ІаҜҚ (camping), а®“а®ҹа®ҝа®ӨаҜҚ а®Өа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҝа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ІаҜҚ а®Һа®© а®Һа®ӨаҜҲа®ҜаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®ҡаҜҶа®ҜаҜҚа®Ҝа®Іа®ҫа®®аҜҚ. а®Үа®ұаҜҒа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®Ҝа®ҫа®°аҜҚ а®®а®ҝа®•а®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҶа®°а®ҝа®Ҝ а®Әа®Ја®•аҜҚа®•а®ҫа®°а®°а®ҫа®• а®үа®°аҜҒа®өаҜҶа®ҹаҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ?

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER III - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #LF #A1 #313 #DRS
snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER III 

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE esports tournaments in South Asia is here. 

Top teams from Pakistan рҹҮөрҹҮ°, Bangladesh рҹҮ§рҹҮ©, and Nepal рҹҮірҹҮө enter the battlefield to face an intense multi day grind filled with strategy, rotations, and highpressure fights.

Over 4 days, squads will battle across multiple matches where every elimination, every rotation, and every decision can change the standings.

Expect clutch moments, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves. 

Only one team will riseвҖҰ
and claim the Ultimate Grind title.

THE GRIND BEGINS NOW. рҹ”Ҙ

рҹҸҶ PARTICIPATING TEAMS

рҹҮөрҹҮ° 4THRIVES

bn.description:
рҹ“© аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰёаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰҝаҰ• аҰңаҰҝаҰңа§ҚаҰһаҰҫаҰёаҰҫ вҶ’ rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com

аҰёаҰ¬аҰҡа§ҮаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ—аҰІаҰҫаҰҹа§Ү аҰҸаҰ«аҰёаҰҝ аҰ®а§ӢаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҮаҰІ аҰ¶а§ӢаҰЎаҰҫаҰүаҰЁа§Ү аҰёа§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ—аҰӨаҰ®! рҹӨҜ

аҰҶаҰң, аҰЎаҰҝаҰ®аҰҝаҰёа§ҚаҰҹа§ҮаҰ°аҰҝаҰ“ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ а§§а§§а§Ҝ TOTS аҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҡаҰҝаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ°а§ӢаҰЁаҰҫаҰІа§ҚаҰЎа§Ӣ аҰ¶а§ӢаҰЎаҰҫаҰүаҰЁа§Ү а§§а§Ұ,а§Ұа§Ұа§Ұ аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫ аҰ¬аҰҫаҰңаҰҝ аҰ§аҰ°аҰӣаҰҝ!

аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰјаҰ®аҰҫаҰ¬аҰІа§Җ: аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҰа§ҒаҰңаҰЁа§ҮаҰҮ а§§а§§а§Ҝ OVR аҰ°а§ӢаҰЁаҰҫаҰІа§ҚаҰЎа§ӢаҰ•а§Ү аҰ•а§ҮаҰЁа§ҚаҰҰа§ҚаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰёа§ҮаҰ°аҰҫ аҰёа§ҚаҰ•а§ӢаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰЎ аҰӨа§ҲаҰ°аҰҝ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҮаҰӣаҰҝаҘӨ аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬аҰЎаҰј аҰҹа§ҒаҰҮаҰёа§ҚаҰҹ аҰҶаҰӣа§Ү: аҰҜаҰ–аҰЁаҰҮ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°а§ӢаҰЁаҰҫаҰІа§ҚаҰЎа§Ӣ аҰ—а§ӢаҰІ аҰ•аҰ°аҰ¬а§Ү, аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰЎаҰҝаҰ®аҰҝаҰёа§ҚаҰҹа§ҮаҰ°аҰҝаҰ“аҰ° аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҘаҰ® аҰҸаҰ•аҰҫаҰҰаҰ¶ аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰҸаҰ•аҰңаҰЁ аҰ–а§ҮаҰІа§ӢаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰЎаҰјаҰ•а§Ү аҰёаҰ°аҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰӨаҰҫаҰ° аҰңаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰ—аҰҫаҰҜаҰј аҰҸаҰ•аҰңаҰЁ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰ°а§ӢаҰһа§ҚаҰң аҰ–а§ҮаҰІа§ӢаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰЎаҰјаҰ•а§Ү аҰЁаҰҫаҰ®аҰҫаҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°аҰ¬! аҰҜаҰҰаҰҝ аҰӨаҰҫаҰ° аҰ°а§ӢаҰЁаҰҫаҰІа§ҚаҰЎа§Ӣ аҰ—а§ӢаҰІ аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү, аҰӨаҰ¬а§Ү аҰёа§Ү аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰ–а§ҮаҰІа§ӢаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰЎаҰјаҰ•а§Ү аҰёаҰ°аҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҰа§ҮаҰ¬а§ҮаҘӨ

а§©аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҡа§ҮаҰ° аҰӘаҰ°, аҰҜаҰҫаҰ° аҰҹаҰҝаҰ®а§ҮаҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹ OVR аҰёаҰ¬аҰҡа§ҮаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ¶аҰҝ аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰ¬а§Ү, аҰёа§Ү-аҰҮ аҰЁаҰ—аҰҰ аҰҹаҰҫаҰ•аҰҫ аҰңаҰҝаҰӨаҰ¬а§Ү! рҹ’ё

рҹ”Ҙ RkGang-аҰҸаҰ° аҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰ·а§ҚаҰҜ:
аҰҡаҰІа§ҒаҰЁ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“аҰӨа§Ү а§§а§¬,а§Ұа§Ұа§Ұ аҰІаҰҫаҰҮаҰ• аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ а§§,а§Ұа§Ұа§Ұ аҰЁаҰӨа§ҒаҰЁ аҰёаҰҫаҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ° аҰӘа§ӮаҰ°а§ҚаҰЈ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҝ! аҰҸаҰҮ аҰҜаҰҫаҰӨа§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰҜаҰј аҰҜа§ӢаҰ— аҰҰаҰҝаҰӨа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰ¬ аҰ¬аҰҫаҰҹаҰЁа§Ү аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰӯа§ҒаҰІаҰ¬а§ҮаҰЁ аҰЁаҰҫ!

аҰЎаҰҝаҰ®аҰҝаҰёа§ҚаҰҹа§ҮаҰ°аҰҝаҰ“-аҰ•а§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰ¬ аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰӨаҰҫаҰ•а§Ү а§© аҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰ· аҰёаҰҫаҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰҮаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰӘа§ҢаҰҒаҰӣаҰҫаҰӨа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ№аҰҫаҰҜа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ!

вҸұпёҸ аҰ…аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰёаҰ®а§ӮаҰ№:
а§Ұ:а§Ұа§Ұ - аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰјаҰ®аҰҫаҰ¬аҰІа§Җ
а§Ұ:а§«а§® - а§§а§§а§Ҝ аҰ°а§ӢаҰЁаҰҫаҰІа§ҚаҰЎа§Ӣ аҰёа§ҚаҰ•а§ӢаҰҜаҰјаҰҫаҰЎ аҰ—аҰ аҰЁ
а§Ә:а§Әа§Ҝ - аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҡ а§§: аҰҡа§ӮаҰЎаҰјаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰІаҰЎаҰјаҰҫаҰҮ аҰ¶а§ҒаҰ°а§Ғ!

а§¬:а§«а§Ә - аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҘаҰ® аҰ¬а§ҚаҰ°а§ӢаҰһа§ҚаҰң аҰ¶аҰҫаҰёа§ҚаҰӨаҰҝ
а§ӯ:а§Әа§© - аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҡ а§Ё: аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰ¬аҰЁа§ҚаҰ§аҰ•аҰӨаҰҫ аҰ•аҰҫаҰҹаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰ“аҰ аҰҫ
а§§а§Ұ:а§Ұа§© - аҰҰа§ҚаҰ¬аҰҝаҰӨа§ҖаҰҜаҰј аҰ¶аҰҫаҰёа§ҚаҰӨаҰҝ аҰӘаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬
а§§а§Ұ:а§©а§Ұ - аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҡ а§©: вӮ№а§§а§Ұ,а§Ұа§Ұа§Ұ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰҫаҰІ
а§§а§©:а§©а§Ё - аҰҡа§ӮаҰЎаҰјаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ OVR аҰҜаҰҫаҰҡаҰҫаҰҮ аҰ“ аҰӘа§ҒаҰ°аҰёа§ҚаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҝаҰӨаҰ°аҰЈ!

id.description:
рҹ“© Pertanyaan Bisnis вҶ’ rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com

Selamat datang di Pertandingan FC Mobile TERGILA! рҹӨҜ

Hari ini, DeMysterio dan saya mempertaruhkan вӮ№10.000 dalam Pertandingan Cristiano Ronaldo TOTS 119!

de-DE.title: TEAM-BUILDER-SHOWDOWN - TOTS RONALDO
de-DE.description:
рҹ“© GeschГӨftliche Anfragen вҶ’ rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com

Willkommen zum verrГјcktesten FC Mobile Showdown aller Zeiten! рҹӨҜ

Heute spielen DeMysterio und ich um 10.000 вӮ№ im 119 TOTS Cristiano Ronaldo Showdown!

Die Regeln: Wir haben beide unsere bestmГ¶glichen Teams um Ronaldo mit einer Gesamtbewertung von 119 zusammengestellt. Aber es gibt einen groГҹen Clou: Jedes Mal, wenn mein Ronaldo trifft, darf ich einen Spieler aus DeMysterios Startelf entfernen und durch einen Bronze-Spieler ersetzen! Wenn SEIN Ronaldo trifft, entfernt er meinen Spieler.

Nach 3 Spielen gewinnt das Team mit der hГ¶chsten verbleibenden Gesamtbewertung das Preisgeld! рҹ’ё

рҹ”Ҙ RkGang-Ziele: Lasst uns 16.000 LIKES und 1.000 NEUE ABONNENTEN fГјr dieses Video erreichen! Klicke unbedingt auf den Abonnieren-Button, um dabei zu sein!

Abonniere DeMysterio und hilf ihm, die 300.000 Abonnenten zu knacken!

вҸұпёҸ Kapitel:
0:00 вҖ“ Die Regeln
0:58 вҖ“ Die 119 Ronaldo-Teams aufbauen
4:49 вҖ“ Spiel 1: Der Showdown beginnt!
6:54 вҖ“ Die erste Bronze-Strafe
7:43 вҖ“ Spiel 2: Das Handicap Гјberstehen
10:03 вҖ“ Die zweite Strafphase
10:30 вҖ“ Spiel 3: Das 10.000-вӮ№-Finale
13:32 вҖ“ Letzte GES-ГңberprГјfung & Auszahlung!
